name: epam-sf-meeting-brief
description: AI-powered meeting brief agent for the EPAM Salesforce Practice. Researches contacts from LinkedIn, Crunchbase, news, Outlook, and EPAM internal systems. Delivers a 13-section brief including mutual LinkedIn connections and warm introduction paths, plus a formatted Word document. Trigger phrases: 'prepare for a meeting', 'generate a meeting brief', 'research a contact', 'brief me on someone'.
